title: Catherine Bohart: Again, With Feelings
full_description: Catherine Bohart is back and is officially a lesbian, which is new. She's navigating life at 35 dating someone in their twenties, introducing her new girlfriend to her Irish parents, dealing with difficult questions about who carries the baby, and diving into taxidermy for an ex that proved more expensive than you'd think. Nominated for Best Show at the Edinburgh Comedy Awards 2024. ★★★★★ Guardian.
ai_summary: Nominated for Best Show at Edinburgh Comedy Awards 2024 — Bohart returns with an hour about the unexpected joys and complications of finally knowing herself: coming out properly, falling for someone younger, negotiating Irish family expectations, and accidentally getting very into taxidermy.
